# Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why. 1-3 sentences max.

# Changes

-
-

# Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] perf

# Checklist

- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun run check` passes
- [ ] `bun test` passes, or tests are not needed
- [ ] Conventional commit message used
- [ ] Changeset added if user-facing, or noted as not needed
- [ ] PR description is concise
